Carthage

Mentions Timeline (3 articles)
3302-07-28
Galactic News Latest Imperial Campaign Concludes
Lavigny's Legion confirms its appeal for thallium, thermal cooling units and CMM composites reached a successful conclusion, with scores of pilots supporting the campaign to construct three new Majestic-class Interdictors at Marker Depot in Carthage.
3302-07-21
Community Goal A Majestic Development
Lavigny's Legion in Carthage launches a campaign to add three new Majestic-class Interdictors to the Imperial fleet, authorised by the Emperor as a response to the Federation's ongoing military build-up.
3302-07-21
Community Goal Restoring Order in Carthage
Authorities in Carthage report a sharp increase in criminals and issue a kill order on all wanted ships to prevent disruption of Lavigny's Legion's Majestic-class Interdictor campaign.
